etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Emptiness futility excessive pride; experiencing pride futility and vanity vanousness supported by humility awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Emptiness futility excessive pride → pride/futility → contemporary vanity and having vanity pride and vanity futility with developmental development

contemporary_usage.raw_content:
